channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: EFTA Corporate Bond Raises Double Target, Signaling Investor Confidence
item.description: A corporate bond issued by Equity for Tanzania (EFTA) has received overwhelming interest from investors, raising over 33 billion Tanzanian shillings—more than twice its original target of 15 billion. ...

item.title: Israel releases and deports foreign activists detained during Gaza-bound flotilla
item.description: On Thursday, Israel confirmed that it had deported all foreign activists detained during the recent Gaza-bound flotilla mission following strong global reactions over their treatment. Israel’s Foreign...

item.title: Eleven NHS staff dismissed and fourteen sanctioned for accessing stabbing victims’ medical records
item.description: Nottingham University Hospitals Foundation Trust has dismissed 11 staff members and sanctioned 14 others for improperly accessing the medical records of victims from the June 2023 Nottingham stabbing ...

item.title: Trump Administration's IRS Settlement and Its Implications for Accountability
item.description: The article reports on a highly controversial IRS settlement orchestrated during the Trump administration, describing it as a $1.776 billion fund allegedly intended to reward individuals who claim to ...

item.title: Secret Abortion Practices in Dar es Salaam Pose Serious Health Risks
item.description: In Dar es Salaam, a hidden network is providing abortion services outside legal and medical supervision, putting many women in serious danger. These services, often arranged through WhatsApp or phone ...

item.title: Yale Committee Highlights Declining Trust in Higher Education and Recommends Reforms
item.description: A recent report by Yale University's Committee on Trust in Higher Education has highlighted a concerning decline in public trust toward universities, urging urgent attention to the matter. The committ...

item.title: Seventeen speech-language pathologists successfully pass PRC licensure exam
item.description: The Professional Regulation Commission (PRC) announced that 17 out of 19 examinees successfully passed the computer-based licensure examination for speech-language pathologists. The exam was conducted...

item.title: Examining the Impact of Pension Policies on Britain’s Welfare System
item.description: The article examines the persistent imbalance in the UK's welfare system, particularly highlighting the disproportionate focus on cutting benefits for young people while pensioner benefits remain larg...

item.title: Court Proceedings Collapse in High-Profile Extortion Case Involving Taxi Boss
item.description: The recent withdrawal of charges against taxi boss Joe 'Ferrari' Sibanyoni and his associates in the Kwaggafontein magistrate’s court has sparked both concern and outrage in South Africa. Sibanyoni an...

item.title: Intimate 1993 Polaroids of Kate Moss Captured by Ellen von Unwerth for Vogue
item.description: In July 1993, iconic supermodel Kate Moss was photographed by Ellen von Unwerth during a Vogue US shoot titled 'Beauty and the Beach' in Miami. These images were captured on type 100 peel-apart Polaro...

item.title: Saudi Arabia donates 25 tonnes of dates to Tanzania to support Eid celebrations
item.description: Tanzania has received a big donation of 25 tonnes of dates from Saudi Arabia, showing the strong friendship between the two countries. The donation was organised through the King Salman Humanitarian A...

item.title: President Ramaphosa Leads Bilateral Talks in Botswana
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa is currently undertaking a state visit to Botswana, which is highlighted by the sixth session of the Botswana and South Africa Bi-National Commission (BNC) in Gaborone. This ...

item.title: Tanzania and Kenya Commit to Agricultural Partnership to Strengthen Food Security
item.description: Tanzania and Kenya have decided to work more closely in the field of agriculture so as to increase trade, investment and food security in East Africa. This agreement came after high-level talks held i...

item.title: Google Introduces AI-Powered Search Mode with Interactive Features
item.description: Google has rolled out a major update to its search engine, introducing an 'intelligent search box' powered by its Gemini 3.5 Flash AI model. This new 'AI Mode' allows users to engage in a continuous c...

item.title: GHACOF Forecasts Below-Normal Rainfall in Northern Greater Horn of Africa for June–September 2026
item.description: The Greater Horn of Africa Climate Outlook Forum (GHACOF) has projected that much of the northern Greater Horn of Africa is likely to experience below-normal rainfall during the June–September 2026 se...

item.title: Misan Harriman faces media backlash amid racial and political scrutiny in UK culture
item.description: Misan Harriman, the chair of London's Southbank Centre, is facing an orchestrated media campaign targeting his suitability to lead one of Europe's largest cultural institutions. Renowned as a photogra...

item.title: Former Border Patrol Chief Criticizes Tom Homan Over Immigration Policy
item.description: Tom Homan, President Donald Trump's top immigration adviser, is facing criticism from outgoing Border Patrol commander Greg Bovino. Bovino, recently forced into retirement, claims that Homan's approac...

item.title: Highlighting Inspiring Women Runners in the 40–49 Age Group at Times Internet Half Marathon 2026
item.description: The Times Internet Half Marathon 2026 celebrated remarkable stories of women runners, particularly in the 5K 40–49 female category. The event highlighted fitness, consistency, and personal growth rath...

item.title: Kenyan Woman Shares Boda Boda Rider's Love Messages During TikTok Challenge
item.description: A Kenyan woman named Hellen recently went viral after sharing the flirtatious messages from her boda boda rider on TikTok. The rider confessed that he had fallen deeply in love with her, stating that ...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs target final win to equal 2019/20 points record
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs are set to face Chippa United at Moses Mabhida Stadium on Saturday in the final match of the 2025/26 season. Despite already securing third place in the league, Chiefs right-back Reeve F...
